claims.text: Transcription factors regulate gene expression through complex and co-operative mechanisms
claims.source_quote: Transcription factors (TFs) regulate gene expression through complex and co-operative mechanisms.

claims.text: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks
claims.source_quote: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks

claims.text: Current approaches do not fully analyze interactions among various transcription factors
claims.source_quote: without a full analysis of the possible interactions among various TFs

claims.text: Deep learning models based on Temporal Convolutional Networks can predict multiple TF binding profiles
claims.source_quote: Our deep learning models are based on Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs), which are able to predict multiple TF binding profiles

claims.text: Multi-label learning can capture correlations among transcription factors and their cooperative regulatory mechanisms
claims.source_quote: capturing correlations among TFs and their cooperative regulatory mechanisms

claims.text: Multi-label learning can reveal biologically meaningful motifs and co-binding patterns
claims.source_quote: multi-label learning leading to reliable predictive performances can reveal biologically meaningful motifs and co-binding patterns
